name: Tania School Bus
recent_news: No recent M&A news; small, owner-run service with 15+ years of operation per business listings (as of 2024-2025).
fit_notes: Very small, single-owner Hialeah school transport serving 3 specific Miami Springs/Hialeah schools. Likely sub-scale for a tuck-in unless rolled up with other Miami-Dade micro-operators; possible succession candidate given owner-operated profile.

name: Cape Cod Small Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: No corroborating web presence found. The website 'capecodsmbussvc.com' appears to belong to 'Cape Cod Small Business Services' — a tax/bookkeeping firm in MA, not a PA school-bus operator. Address 756 Lindsay Rd, Carnegie PA 15106 is a residential property (per Redfin). Likely a misclassified/defunct record; nearby Carnegie-area operators include Monark Student Transportation.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm this as an actual operating PA school-bus contractor. Likely a data-quality issue (record mismatch or defunct shell). Not actionable as a tuck-in target without further on-the-ground verification.

name: M R Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Likely Appling County School System or nearby SE GA districts (unverified)
recent_news: No web presence located. Appling County Schools' transportation appears to be district-operated (Bus Shop at 680 Blackshear Hwy, Baxley). Could be a small family-run contractor or an out-of-date listing.
fit_notes: Rural SE Georgia (Appling County) micro-operator; cannot confirm operating status. Most GA districts run buses in-house, making private contractor tuck-ins rare in this geography. Low priority absent more data.

name: Varsity Transit Inc
owner_or_parent: Historically affiliated with Green Bus Lines / Triboro Coach / Jamaica Central Railways (now defunct/divested)
principals: Historical: Jerome Cooper (chairman of original Varsity Transit, ceased 2003)
founded_year: 1965 (original); current entity at this address unclear
service_types: possibly charter via affiliated 'Varsity Coach Inc.'
districts_or_customers: Historically NYC DOE Office of Pupil Transportation
recent_news: Original Varsity Transit ceased school-bus operations in 2003; successor Varsity Bus Co. (Brooklyn) ceased by the 2010s. A 'Varsity Transit / Varsity Coach Inc.' listing remains at 2345 87th St, East Elmhurst, NY 11369 (ph 718-335-3077) — may be a residual coach/charter entity, not active NYC DOE school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Legacy NYC name with residual address; original school-bus business ceased 2003. Unless current entity has active NYC DOE OPT contracts (not confirmed), unlikely to be a meaningful tuck-in. Worth a quick OPT contract-list check before any outreach.

name: J & J School Bus Trnsprtn Inc
recent_news: J & J School Bus Transportation Inc. was filed 02/03/2020 with FL Sunbiz and underwent VOLUNTARY DISSOLUTION on 02/21/2021 — entity is INACTIVE. The 'bu99y.com' website now belongs to Buggy Technologies Inc. (CEO Isabel Berney), a separate Miami student-rideshare/van service, not the dissolved J&J entity.
website: bu99y.com (now operated by unrelated Buggy Technologies Inc.)
fit_notes: Dissolved entity — not an actionable acquisition target. Skip. (Buggy Technologies, which now uses the website, is a separate Miami premium student-rideshare startup and would be a very different deal profile.)
